script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== distinct chats heather has received inbound from (last 50 activities) ==='
tail -50 /home/heather/.heather-bot/activities.jsonl 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import sys,json
from collections import Counter
cids=Counter()
for line in sys.stdin:
  try:
    a=json.loads(line); b=json.loads(a.get("body","{}"))
    cid=(b.get("conversation") or {}).get("id","?")
    ctype=(b.get("conversation") or {}).get("conversationType","?")
    sender=((b.get("from") or {}).get("name","?"))
    cids[(cid[:50], ctype, sender)] += 1
  except: pass
for (cid,ctype,sender),n in cids.most_common(20):
  print(f"  {n:3} {ctype:12} from={sender:30} chat_id={cid}")'

echo '=== BF auth test for Heather bot SP ==='
KAYE_KEY=$(az bot show -g SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw -n OpenClaw-HeatherAgent --query 'properties.msaAppId' -o tsv 2>/dev/null)
echo "  HeatherAgent msaAppId: $KAYE_KEY"
echo "  endpoint: $(az bot show -g SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw -n OpenClaw-HeatherAgent --query 'properties.endpoint' -o tsv 2>/dev/null)"
echo "  teamsChannel enabled: $(az bot msteams show -g SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw -n OpenClaw-HeatherAgent --query 'properties.isEnabled' -o tsv 2>/dev/null)"

echo '=== nginx route present for heather endpoint path? ==='
sudo grep -nE 'heather|heatherai' /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/* 2>/dev/null | head -10

echo '=== heather-bot creds: secret value (length, not content) ==='
ls -la /home/heather/.heather-bot/creds.json 2>/dev/null
sudo python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/home/heather/.heather-bot/creds.json')); print('  keys:', sorted(d.keys())); print('  app_id ends:', d.get('app_id','')[-12:] if d.get('app_id') else 'N/A'); print('  secret len:', len(d.get('client_secret','')))" 2>&1 | head -5

echo '=== try minting BF token with heather creds ==='
sudo bash -c '
APP_ID=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open(\"/home/heather/.heather-bot/creds.json\"))[\"app_id\"])")
SEC=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open(\"/home/heather/.heather-bot/creds.json\"))[\"client_secret\"])")
TEN=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open(\"/home/heather/.heather-bot/creds.json\"))[\"tenant\"])")
curl -sS -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/$TEN/oauth2/v2.0/token" \
  --data-urlencode "client_id=$APP_ID" \
  --data-urlencode "client_secret=$SEC" \
  --data-urlencode "grant_type=client_credentials" \
  --data-urlencode "scope=https://api.botframework.com/.default" \
  | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(\"  has_token=\"+ (\"yes\" if \"access_token\" in d else \"NO, err=\"+str(d.get(\"error_description\",d)[:200])))"
'
echo '===END==='
